abort.already_configured: This sender address is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to mail server. Verify the server address, port, and security settings.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check your username and password.
error.invalid_email: Invalid email address. Check the format (e.g. user@example.com).

data_description.debug: Log detailed SMTP communication for troubleshooting
data_description.password: Leave empty to keep current password.
data_description.recipient: Default recipient. Can be overwritten per service call. Comma-separate multiple.
data_description.sender: The email address notifications will be sent from
data_description.sender_name: Friendly name shown in emails. Can be overwritten per service call.
data_description.timeout: How long to wait for server response
data_description.username: Your email address or account username
data_description.verify_ssl: Recommended to keep enabled for security

user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your email server to send notifications.
user.title: SMTP Email Setup

attachment_not_found.message: Attachment "{file_path}" not found. Check the file path and ensure the file exists.

entry_not_found.message: The selected SMTP account was not found or is not loaded.

remote_path_not_allowed.message: Cannot send email with attachment "{file_name}" from directory "{file_path}" which is not secure to load data from. Only folders added to `{allow_list}` are accessible. See {url} for more information.

deprecated_yaml.description:
Configuring SMTP using YAML is being removed.

Your existing YAML configuration has been imported into the UI automatically.

Remove the SMTP YAML configuration from your configuration.yaml file and restart Home Assistant to fix this issue.
deprecated_yaml.title: SMTP YAML configuration is being removed

send_message.description: Send an email message via SMTP.

config_entry.description: The SMTP account to send from.
config_entry.name: Account

from_name.description: Leave empty to use the default from name from setup.
from_name.name: From name

html.description: HTML formatted content. Supports Jinja2 templates for dynamic content.
html.name: HTML content

images.description: List of image file paths to attach (e.g. /config/www/snapshot.jpg).
images.name: Attachments

message.description: Plain text body. Supports templates. Optional if HTML content is provided.
message.name: Message

to.description: Add one email per line. Leave empty to use the default recipient(s) from setup.
to.name: Recipients

send_message.name: Send email
